calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly schuduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Patrick Head.
John Zanghi, Esq. for Plaintiff Hibernia Hotel Group, LLC. present by Al Geisler the property manager. Defendant, Harold Fullen present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement for Stipulation for Entry Of Judgment and Judgment. Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entieled to possession and restitution of the property located at 161 Powell St., #206, San Francisco. Forfeiture of the rental atreement, back rent or damages $2,100.00, stayed of execution through Aug. 1, 2003. Defendant agrees to vacate the premises on or before 5 PM. on Aug. 1, 2003 and personally delivered the key to counsel's office with a written notice. If Defendat complies, plaintiff waives back rent and damages from May 5 through Aug. 1, 2003. While Defendant remains in possession, Defendant shall only use the MICROWAVE oven for cooking.
Defendant waives right to security deposit, rents or interest held by plaintiff.
If Defendant fails to vacate as agreed, Plaintiff is entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendant upon ex-parte application and declaration with 24 hours notice to the Defendant.
Each party waives claim against the other. Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of. No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture. Plaintiff shall provide a written mutual reference to Defendant by 6-13-03. If Defendant complied with terms, plaintiff to file dismissal with prejudice.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
